title: VDeleteCalibration Method, Spel Class
parameters: CalibName	String expression containing the name of a vision calibration in the current EPSON RC+ project.
description: Deletes a vision calibration in the current project.
see_also:
VCreateCalibration

VDeleteObject

VDeleteSequence

VDeleteCalibration Example

VB Example:

m_spel.VDeleteCalibration("mycal")

C# Example:

m_spel.VDeleteCalibration("mycal");
